pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.1.9.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Change project packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new JHipster sample application naming convention.
Import JHipster dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions centrally.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ JSR-310 (java.time) Jackson datatype.
Upgrade Hibernate from version 4 to 5 to match Spring Boot 2.x requirements.
Upgrade Liquibase to version 4.x to support Hibernate 5 and modern database features.
Replace legacy swagger-springmvc with SpringFox OAS/Swagger2 for API documentation.
Replace deprecated commons-lang with commons-lang3.
Add MapStruct dependencies for type-safe bean mapping.
Add Testcontainers MySQL dependency for integration testing.
Switch from Hibernate Ehcache integration to standard JCache (JSR-107) with Ehcache provider.
Update Spring Boot starter dependencies to match Spring Boot 2.x naming and structure (e.g., actuator, mail).
Update Maven plugin versions to be compatible with Java 11 and modern build standards.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Add JJWT dependencies required for JWT token handling in the migrated application.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added jjwt-api, jjwt-impl, and jjwt-jackson dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ArchUnit dependencies for architectural testing with JUnit 5.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error responses.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Add Dropwizard Metrics core dependency.
Add Spring Security Data dependency for user details manager support.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency explicitly.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from Spring Boot Starter Test to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels.
Configure Jib Maven Plugin to use an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image for containerization.
Remove Yeoman Maven Plugin which was used for older frontend build processes.
Add Frontend Maven Plugin to manage Node.js and npm installation for frontend builds.
Add Jib Maven Plugin for container image building without a Docker daemon.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin for code coverage reporting.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin with unit and integration test executions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Liquibase Maven Plugin for database migration management.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties.
Add Properties Maven Plugin to read project properties from files.
Add Checkstyle Maven Plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Javadoc Maven Plugin for documentation generation.
Add Failsafe Maven Plugin for integration testing.
Add IDEA Maven Plugin for IntelliJ IDEA project generation.
Add Resources Maven Plugin for resource filtering.
Add Sonar Maven Plugin for static code analysis.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to allow Java versions 8 through 15.
Add new Maven profiles for no-liquibase, api-docs, tls, and webpack.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added profiles with ids no-liquibase, api-docs, tls, and webpack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Tomcat starter dependency as it is included in Web starter.
Introduce frontend-maven-plugin to manage Node.js and NPM installation and execution within the Maven build lifecycle.
Configure specific executions for webpack build and test steps using the frontend-maven-plugin.
Define a 'dev' Maven profile with dependencies for development tools like H2, Undertow, and Spring Boot DevTools.
Define a 'prod' Maven profile with production-specific dependencies and build configurations.
Add a 'war' profile to enable the maven-war-plugin for generating WAR archives.
Create an 'IDE' profile to include annotation processors for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator.
Add an 'eclipse' profile with lifecycle mapping metadata to suppress warnings in Eclipse IDE.
Introduce an 'e2e' profile for end-to-end testing with specific final name and plugin management.
Update maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean the new static resources directory structure.
Add build-info goal execution to spring-boot-maven-plugin to generate actuator build information.
Include git-commit-id-plugin to generate git information properties during the build.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and remove obsolete glob patterns.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific glob [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and removed [{package,bower}.json] section.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to ensure correct line-ending normalization and binary file handling across all file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with a detailed list including `* text=auto`, explicit CRLF for Windows scripts, and binary definitions for archives, media, and compiled artifacts.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration.
Change the application package name and base name to match the new sample application identity.
Switch authentication mechanism from cookie-based to JWT.
Migrate the frontend build tool from Grunt to npm and the framework to AngularX.
Normalize configuration values from string representations to boolean types.
Include Gatling and Protractor in the test frameworks configuration.
Define the initial set of entities for the application.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the outdated README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 template to reflect current build, development, and deployment instructions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt/Bower/AngularJS stack with a modern Angular 11 build pipeline using Angular CLI and Webpack.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, bower, karma; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Switch frontend testing from Karma/Jasmine to Jest to improve speed and integration with the new Angular setup.
Adopt ESLint and Prettier for code formatting and linting, replacing JSHint and Grunt-based linting.
Update end-to-end testing tools to Protractor 7 and Selenium WebDriver 4 to support modern browser automation.
Define comprehensive CI/CD npm scripts for backend and frontend testing, Docker management, and packaging.
package.json.human_impl: Added scripts like ci:backend:test, ci:e2e:run, docker:db:up

package.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator dependency to version 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Add core Angular 11 libraries and related UI components for the frontend application.
Include necessary Webpack plugins for asset copying, error reporting, and bundle analysis in the new build process.
Integrate Husky and lint-staged to enforce code quality checks on pre-commit hooks.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's default colored banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy JHipster format to standard Spring Boot HikariCP properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced `dataSourceClassName` and `url` with `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and updated JDBC URL format.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to JHipster-specific FixedH2Dialect for better compatibility.
Add Liquibase context configuration for development profile.
Enable Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycle.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for cache, security, and mail.
Modernize logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot logging levels.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced custom `metrics` and `cache` logging with `logging.level` entries for ROOT, tech.jhipster, etc.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Configure CORS settings explicitly for the development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added `jhipster.cors` section with allowed origins, methods, and headers.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot properties and JHipster base-url.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Moved mail settings to `spring.mail` and added `jhipster.mail.base-url`.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Configure Thymeleaf cache settings for development.
Explicitly disable H2 console in development profile.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `spring.datasource` from `com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource` with separate `serverName`/`databaseName` to `com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` with a full `url` string.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove deprecated Hibernate dialect and naming strategy properties that are no longer supported or needed in newer Hibernate/Spring Boot versions.
Migrate cache configuration from legacy Spring Boot 1.x `cache` namespace to JHipster-specific `jhipster.cache` namespace.
Replace legacy Spring Boot 1.x `metrics` configuration with Spring Boot 2.x `management.metrics` configuration.
Move mail base URL configuration from Spring namespace to JHipster-specific namespace.
Add JHipster-specific security and JWT configuration required for the application to run with the new framework version.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `jhipster.security.authentication.jwt` block with base64-secret and token validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable HTTP response compression in the server configuration, a feature standardized in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `server.compression.enabled: true` and related mime-types configuration.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Configure graceful shutdown for the server, a feature introduced in Spring Boot 2.3+.
Add explicit logging level configuration for JHipster packages.
Explicitly disable Spring Boot DevTools in production profile.
Add Liquibase context configuration for production profile.
Simplify Thymeleaf configuration by removing deprecated XHTML mode and viewNames.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed `spring.thymeleaf.mode: XHTML` and `spring.thymeleaf.viewNames: error`, keeping only `cache: true`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific HTTP cache header configuration.
Add JHipster-specific logging configuration for JSON format and Logstash.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x structure.
Replace custom async configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to spring.mail namespace.
Update JPA and Hibernate properties to Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions.
Migrate Swagger configuration to JHipster specific api-docs properties.
Add security configuration for management endpoints.
Add Micrometer metrics configuration for Prometheus.
Add server servlet session cookie configuration.
Add info endpoint configuration for ribbon display.

src/main/resources/config/liquibase/chan.general_idea: Update the Liquibase XML schema location to version 4.2 to align with newer JHipster/Liquibase standards.
Add the Liquibase extension namespace to support extended features in the changelog.
Remove the explicit PostgreSQL sequence creation as JHipster moved to using database auto-increment or Hibernate sequences differently.
Rename the user table from T_USER to jhi_user to follow JHipster naming conventions.
Add an explicit 'id' column to the user table as the primary key, replacing the login-based key.
Rename the password column to password_hash to better reflect its content and security implications.
Increase the email column length to 191 characters to support longer email addresses and index constraints.
Add an image_url column to the user table to store profile picture URLs.
Increase the lang_key column length to 10 characters to support more complex locale codes.
Add a reset_key column to the user table for password reset functionality.
Add a reset_date column to the user table to track when the password reset key was generated.
Rename the authority table from T_AUTHORITY to jhi_authority to follow JHipster naming conventions.
Rename the user authority table from T_USER_AUTHORITY to jhi_user_authority to follow JHipster naming conventions.
Update the user authority table columns to use user_id and authority_name instead of login and name.
Remove the T_PERSISTENT_TOKEN table as JHipster moved away from persistent login tokens in this version.
Remove the hibernate_sequences table as it is no longer needed with the new ID generation strategy.
Update the primary key and foreign key constraints for the user authority table to match the new column names.
Update the loadData file paths to reflect the new directory structure and file names.
Add a not-null constraint to the password_hash column to ensure data integrity.
Drop the default value for the created_date column to allow explicit setting or database-specific defaults.
Remove the persistent audit event tables as they are no longer part of the initial schema in this JHipster version.
Add a jhi_date_time_wrapper table for testing date and time handling in the application.
